Abstract

Rare diseases affect more than 300 million people worldwide1,2,3, yet timely and accurate diagnosis remains an urgent challenge1,3,4,5. Patients often endure a prolonged ‘diagnostic odyssey’ exceeding 5 years, marked by repeated referrals, misdiagnoses and unnecessary interventions, leading to delayed treatment and substantial emotional and economic burden4,5. Here we present DeepRare—a multi-agent sys
